name: John BizDirector
subject: AI Agent Transformation for SG Logistics Services
body:
Hi John,

I noticed SG Logistics Services is doing great work. At AIMS, we help Singapore SMEs transition into autonomous, high-efficiency AI agents. I would love to schedule a quick chat to explore how this applies to you.

Best,
Lily
